title: General Pest Control Upper West Side | $175-$300 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional general pest control in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Trusted service for brownstones, pre-war buildings & apartments. $175-$300. Same-day available.
intro: The Upper West Side's beautiful pre-war buildings and tree-lined streets create an ideal home for residents and pests alike. Our general pest control services protect your brownstone, co-op, or apartment from roaches, ants, mice, and other common NYC pests. With treatments ranging from $175-$300, we deliver effective, safe pest management tailored to Upper West Side properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of Upper West Side buildings, from century-old brownstones to modern high-rises along Central Park West. Our licensed technicians provide discreet, effective treatments that respect your home and neighborhood while delivering guaranteed results.
localContext: From Riverside Park to Central Park, the Upper West Side's proximity to green spaces and aging building infrastructure makes regular pest control essential. We serve landmarks near Lincoln Center, the Museum of Natural History, and the iconic residential blocks between Columbus and Amsterdam Avenues, ensuring your classic Manhattan home stays pest-free.

faqs.question: What pests are most common in Upper West Side apartments?
faqs.answer: Upper West Side residents most frequently encounter German cockroaches, mice, bed bugs, and ants. Pre-war buildings with older plumbing and shared walls are particularly susceptible to roach and rodent infestations. Our general pest control service addresses these common pests with targeted treatments.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: General pest control in the Upper West Side ranges from $175 to $300, depending on your property size, infestation severity, and building type. Brownstones and multi-unit buildings may require more comprehensive treatment than smaller apartments. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for Upper West Side families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in low-toxicity application techniques ideal for occupied homes and apartments. We also offer eco-friendly treatment options upon request.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout the Upper West Side, from 59th Street to 110th Street. Our local Manhattan team can typically respond within hours for urgent pest issues. Schedule online or call us for immediate assistance with your pest problem.
